name: In SPACE no one can hear you CLICK

reviews.review_description:
For a free game, I must say I'm impressed. I found no bugs and the idea of a cat in space to click buttons, is at first strange but somehow it fits all together. It is also a very good game to speedrun. If this game would add even more levels (maybe even a story? ) then this could get potential.
I wish the developer with this game the best outcome in future!


(Sorry for possible grammar mistakes)
This came before no more rainbows, it's similar but with a different theme and floaty jumping. I really enjoyed my time with this, its a tough one though!
Like many others have said, it’s short and sweet. Very very fun and unique really good gorilla tag fan game that aesthetic is really cool too.
Really needs a quick reset button though

developer_response.body: Thank you! You can hold the menu button to return "Home" at any point and try again.

reviews.review_description: I can’t play because my joystick are drifting so can please ade an option when you start the game to disable it but if not great games

Very fun in my opinion, the no gravity was really fun, jumping around in a huge area in a keyboard and doing parkour was fun, would love to see some more stuff in this game though, but overall very fun and has potential for a bigger game.

I really enjoyed this experience. The movement worked very well (similar to gorilla tag) and the levels where well layer out. But I just really wish there was more to the game it is very short, but I don’t have a problem with that as it is free. I really feel this game has some huge potential. And I would love to see more added

reviews.review_title: When will deconcrizator be on applab
reviews.review_description: When will deconcrizator will be on applab

This game was good. It was fun swing my arms around like an ape, but it took some time to get good at it. I fell off a lot. To escape the key I like how there’s two endings, and I can tell that there is more endings (because there are more achievements), but I have no idea how to get them. The game takes like 20 minutes to beat for someone like me, but it goes further, and gives you the option to speed run the game and compete with others. Pretty fun, and free.

reviews.review_title: THIS IS THE BESTT GAME EVERRRR
reviews.review_description: this game like is so good
This is a short but sweet experience that I would totally recommend. If you have finished the game, just play it aGaim and look for ths Other emdigs. GybSorry, cat on my keyboard.
Very creative game!! Great to see a some highly original content in VR!!
